---
applyTo: "**"
description: Software Development specialization path-scoped reminders
---

Follow `.github/copilot-instructions.md` as the authoritative Software Development Lead policy. This file only reinforces path-scoped reminders: keep implementation, independent code-quality review, engineering-risk review, and release-readiness assessment separate; require human approval for sensitive or external actions; do not create GitHub Actions, issues, pull requests, commits, deployments, publications, signatures, or releases automatically; and report factual evidence plus checks not run.
